### Stasis Reader App Reviews & Feedback

Thank you for trying the Stasis Reader!

To be eligible for the **8oz turmeric cubes giveaway**, please reply to this thread with your review.

**Please follow this simple format:**


**How to Participate:**

- Star this repository
- Install the Stasis Reader app
- Reply to this thread with your review using the format above

**Rules:**

- Only the **first 30 valid entries** will be entered into the draw.
- 3 winners will be randomly selected to split **8oz** of sun-dried turmeric cubes.
- Reviews must follow the format above to be counted.

We genuinely appreciate your feedback — it helps us improve the app.

Thank you!
